about.title: About TechClever
about.text1: TechClever is a free, ad-free platform that curates the best in technology — games, AI tools, developer resources, productivity apps, and hardware guides.
about.text2: We believe good tech information should be accessible to everyone, without paywalls, clickbait, or hidden agendas. Just honest, curated recommendations.
about.text3: No sponsored content. No affiliate tricks. Just quality picks, explained clearly.
about.value1: Quality Over Quantity — We only recommend tools and games we'd actually use ourselves.
about.value2: Honest Reviews — No sponsorships, no hidden affiliates. Just real opinions.
about.value3: Accessible to All — Free forever, open-source, privacy-friendly.
about.value4: Always Current — We keep our recommendations up to date with the latest tech.
footer.copyright: © 2026 TechClever | Tech. Games. AI. All in One Place.
